calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Hsh Holdings Llc'S Verified Petition To Release Property From Claim Of Mechanic'S Lien Of Respondent Arcon Construction Corporation
Off Calendar Feb-09-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

HEARING ON PETITIONER HSH HOLDINGS LLC'S VERIFIED PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANIC'S LIEN OF RESPONDENT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION is OFF CALENDAR, per the request of moving party.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Hsh Holdings Llc'S Verified Petition To Release Property From Claim Of Mechanic'S Lien Of Respondent Arcon Construction Corporation
Off Calendar Jan-26-2024 Continued To Feb-09-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Leo D. Plotkin; 310-471-3000; Levy, Small & Lallas; counsel for plaintiff.
Andrey Libob appearing on behlaf of Arcon Construction Corporation.

Hearing held. Mr. Libob requests a continuance in order to hire counsel. The Court rules as follows:

PETITIONER HSH HOLDINGS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITIONER HSH HOLDINGS LLC'S VERIFIED PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM CLAIM OF MECHANIC'S LIEN OF RESPONDENT ARCON CONSTRUCTION CORPORATION is CONTINUED to February 9, 2024. Any opposition to be filed no later than February 6, 2024. All parties waive notice.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
